summary: You should instruct the sister to place the testicular biopsy specimen in 10% formalin solution as per standard procedures aimed at ensuring proper preservation until its analysis by the pathologist can be conducted accurately without compromising sample quality due to degradation during transit time. This recommendation prioritizes optimal diagnostic accuracy essential post-surgical care protocols emphasize immediate immersion into preservative fluids such as those containing high concentrations of formaldehyde which effectively halt enzymatic reactions critical before histological evaluation begins later stages laboratory workup process ensues thereafter seamlessly once received intact
